gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/178)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/178)
text: رَجُلٍ تَرَكَ عَمَّتَهُ وَ خَالَتَهُ قَالَ لِلْعَمَّةِ الثُّلُثَانِ وَ لِلْخَالَةِ الثُّلُثُ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan, from Waheyb, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who left his paternal aunt and his maternal aunt. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘For the paternal aunt is the two-thirds and for the maternal aunt is the one-third’.
en.sarwar: 5. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from al-Hassan from Wuhayb from abu Basir who has narrated the following: “About the case of a man who has left behind his paternal aunt and maternal aunt, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The paternal aunt receives two-thirds and the maternal aunt receives one- third.’”
